Here is the full analysis: --- ## Detailed Analysis of SolidJS Components in `/home/garrosh/repos/wc3-components/wc3.js` (chars 120000-180000 and surrounding context) ### Important Note on the 120000-180000 Range The byte range 120000-180000 contains **no SolidJS UI components**. It is entirely **WGSL/WebGPU shader source code** stored as template literal strings. The shader variables and their purposes: | Variable | Purpose | |----------|---------| | `Mh` | PBR shader with normal mapping, shadow mapping, IBL (image-based lighting), team color support | | `_h` | Shadow map depth pass shader | | `Dh` | Simple colored vertex shader (debug/wireframe lines) | | `Lh` | Skybox cubemap shader | | `Rh` | Equirectangular-to-cubemap projection shader | | `Fh` | Irradiance convolution shader (diffuse IBL) | | `$h` | Prefiltered environment map shader (specular IBL, importance sampling GGX) | | `Vh` | BRDF LUT integration shader (split-sum approximation) | | `kh` | Fullscreen quad vertex shader (post-processing) | All shaders implement a physically-based rendering pipeline for WC3 `.mdx` model rendering. --- ### All Component Functions Found (full file) The actual SolidJS components are in the final ~130KB of the file. Here is every component: #### 1. `xb` -- **Main App / Root Component** - **Mounted via**: `Vd(() => ue(xb, {}), El)` where `El = document.getElementById("root")` - **Props**: None - **State**: ~150+ signals (`C()`) managing every UI element's texture URLs, toggle states, numeric values - **Key signals**: `Pt` (current race, default `"Human"`), `uu` (viewport width), `Bt` (mobile breakpoint), various texture URL signals for every BLP asset - **Composition**: Contains ALL showcase sections. Renders the full-page layout: - `Eg` (TopHUD) with race/leftOnly props - `Mg` (HeroSection) with button interaction props - `Hg` (FactionPreview) - `mm` (ButtonsSection) containing many `Ne` (ShowcaseItem) children - `pm` (ControlsSection) containing `Ne` children - `vm` (ResourceCountersSection) - `bm` (CommandCard) - `Tm` (UnitQueue) - `ym` (Tooltip) - `Um` (PortraitFrame) - `Cm` (BarsSection) with bar sub-items - `yp` (BordersSection) - `Im` (DesignTokens) - `Hm` (A11ySection) - `ep` (BundleChart) - `ip` (FAQ) - `gp` (Footer) - **DOM template**: `iv` -- top-level layout with viewport div, showcase flow items #### 2. `Eg` -- **Top HUD (Console Tiles)** - **Props**: `{ race, leftOnly }` - **Template**: `bg` -- `` with WebGL rendering - **Behavior**: Loads 4 HUD tile PNGs per race (`/console/{Race}/{Race}UITile0{1-4}.png`), renders them via WebGL with proper UV mapping to form the in-game console frame - **Helpers**: `Bg` (shader compilation), `Cg` (tile URL builder), `Xs` (shader compile) #### 3. `Mg` -- **Hero Section** - **Props**: `{ onGetStartedMouseUp, onGetStartedMouseDown, onGetStartedMouseLeave, onGetStartedMouseEnter, getStartedCanvasRef, installCanvasRef, getStartedPressed }` - **Template**: `Ag` -- Hero section with logo, subtitle, CTA buttons ("Get Started", install command), version label - **String literals**: `"npm i wc3ui"`, `"Patch 1.27b"`, `"Battle-tested components forged in Azeroth."`, `"1.2kb core"`, social proof stats - **CSS classes**: `hero-section`, `hero-content`, `hero-logo`, `hero-subtitle`, `hero-description`, `hero-cta-row`, `hero-get-started-btn`, `hero-install-editbox`, `hero-version-label`, `social-proof` #### 4. `Hg` -- **Faction Preview Section** - **Props**: None (self-contained) - **Template**: `Dg` -- `
` - **State**: Loads ESC button/slider assets for all 4 races - **Composition**: Maps over `Ws` (4 races) rendering `Og` (FactionPreviewCard) for each #### 5. `Og` -- **Faction Preview Card** - **Props**: `{ race, label, assets, sliderTrackBgUrl, sliderTrackBorderAtlasUrl, resizeTick }` - **Template**: `_g` -- Card with button + slider preview per faction - **CSS classes**: `faction-preview-card`, `faction-preview-label`, `esc-option-preview`, `esc-slider-demo`, `esc-slider-track`, `esc-slider-knob` - **Behavior**: Interactive button with mousedown/mouseup/hover states; slider with canvas-rendered track #### 6. `Qg` -- **Hero Portrait (3D)** - **Props**: `{ race }` - **Template**: `zg` -- `` with WebGL2/WebGL - **Behavior**: Loads `.mdx` model per race (ArchMage, BladeMaster, DemonHunter, DeathKnight), renders animated 3D portrait with camera from model data - **Models**: `/models/hero-portrait/{Race}/Hero*_portrait.mdx` #### 7. `vg` -- **Time Indicator / Clock Widget** - **Props**: `{ race }` - **Template**: `lg` -- `` with CSS mask for clock aperture - **Behavior**: Loads race-specific clock MDX model, renders animated clock hands via WebGL, applies mask from frame texture alpha #### 8. `da` -- **Worker Unit (3D Footer)** - **Props**: `{ race, side }` - **Template**: `op` -- `` for 3D worker unit rendering - **Models**: Peasant (Human), Peon (Orc), Archer (NightElf), Acolyte (Undead) - **Behavior**: Animated stand sequence, auto-selects appropriate animation #### 9. `mm` -- **Buttons Section** - **Props**: `{ children }` - **Template**: `Zg` -- `

` - **Data**: 12 command slots with hotkeys Q/W/E/R/A/S/D/F/Z/X/C/V, states: ready/empty/active/passive/levelup - **CSS classes**: `cmd-btn`, `cmd-btn-empty`, `cmd-btn-icon`, `cmd-btn-highlight`, `cmd-btn-hotkey`, `cmd-btn--passive`, `cmd-btn--levelup`, `cmd-btn--pressed`, `cmd-btn--no-resources`, `cmd-btn-cooldown`, `cmd-btn-fallback-icon` - **Composition**: Uses `kn` (For/each) to render grid cells #### 14. `Tm` -- **Unit Queue** - **Props**: `{ backdropUrl, iconUrl }` - **Template**: `cm` -- `

` with canvas + hex label - **Behavior**: Renders colored swatch with optional 9-slice border atlas #### 19. `Im` -- **Design Tokens Section** - **Props**: `{ borderAtlasUrls }` - **Template**: `Em` -- Section with token grid - **Data**: 4 factions x 4 tokens (Background, Text, Accent, Glow) with color values - **Composition**: Maps `ra` (race colors) x `_m` (token labels), renders `km` for each #### 20. `Hm` -- **Accessibility Section** - **Props**: None - **Template**: `Gm` -- Section "Forged for everyone" - **Checklist**: "Keyboard navigable", "ARIA labels", "Reduced motion", "Colour contrast AA", "Focus-visible rings" #### 21. `Jm` -- **Build Progress Bar (canvas)** - **Props**: `{ valuePct, fillUrl, borderUrl }` - **Template**: `zm` -- `` - **Behavior**: Renders tiled fill + border with UV-aware cap detection from MDX model #### 22. `ep` -- **Bundle Chart Section** - **Props**: `{ buildFillUrl, buildBorderUrl }` - **Template**: `Xm` -- Section "Leaner than a Blademaster with Wind Walk" - **Data**: 10 components with sizes (GoldButton 1.2kb, CommandCard 1.9kb, HeroCard 2.4kb, etc.) - **Composition**: Maps `bl` array, renders `Jm` per component #### 23. `ip` -- **FAQ Section** - **Props**: None - **Template**: `tp` -- FAQ list - **Data**: 4 Q&A pairs including "Is this an official Blizzard product?", "Does it work with Tailwind?", "Can I use it in production?", "Why is there no Blood Elf theme?" #### 24. `gp` -- **Footer** - **Props**: `{ race }` - **Template**: `hp` -- Footer with two worker unit 3D canvases - **Composition**: Two `da` (worker unit) instances (left/right) - **CSS classes**: `site-footer`, `footer-worker-unit`, `footer-content`, `footer-joke` - **Strings**: `"My life for Aiur!" -- wait, wrong game.`, `"banteg 2026"` #### 25. `yp` -- **Borders Section** - **Props**: `{ loadBlpDataUrl }` - **Template**: `mp` -- Border texture gallery - **Data**: 2 categories (Menu, Cinematic) x 4 races = 8 border BLP textures - **CSS classes**: `borders-category`, `border-item`, `border-thumbnail` #### 26. `bb` -- **Menu Frame Variant Button** - **Props**: `{ variant, glueBgUrl, glueBgDownUrl, glueBorderUrl, glueBorderDownUrl, glueHoverUrl }` - **Template**: `Up` -- Button with canvas backdrop + label - **Behavior**: Mouse state tracking, atlas row slicing for button sprites --- ### Key Data Structures **Race Config** (`Ut`): ```js {Human:{tile:"Human",esc:"human",lower:"human",display:"Human"}, Orc:{tile:"Orc",esc:"orc",lower:"orc",display:"Orc"}, NightElf:{tile:"NightElf",esc:"nightelf",lower:"nightelf",display:"Night Elf"}, Undead:{tile:"Undead",esc:"undead",lower:"undead",display:"Undead"}} ``` **Command Card Slots** (in `bm`): 12 entries with `hotkey`, `label`, `iconKey`, `state` (ready/empty/active/passive/levelup) **Button Variant Definitions** (`yd()` in `xb`): 8 button types -- Border, BorderSingle, Large, LargeSingle, Small, SmallSingle, Tiny, Multiplayer -- each with FDF-derived placement data **Design Token Colors** (`ra`): Human `#2a2a3a/#eceff7/#4a7abf/#6db3f2`, Orc `#2a1f1a/#f0e0c0/#bf4a4a/#ff6644`, NightElf `#1a2a2a/#d0e8e0/#4abfaa/#44ffcc`, Undead `#1a1a2a/#c8c0d0/#6a4abf/#8866ff` ### Key CSS Classes (wc3-* and others) - `wc3-bar`, `wc3-bar--unit`, `wc3-bar--health`, `wc3-bar--mana`, `wc3-bar--compact`, `wc3-bar--xp`, `wc3-bar--progress`, `wc3-bar--build` - `wc3-editbox`, `wc3-editbox--esc`, `wc3-editbox--bnet`, `wc3-editbox--disabled` - `wc3-listbox-demo`, `wc3-listbox-item`, `wc3-listbox-item--selected` - `cmd-btn`, `cmd-btn-empty`, `cmd-btn--showcase`, `cmd-btn--passive`, `cmd-btn--levelup`, `cmd-btn--pressed`, `cmd-btn--no-resources` - `esc-option-preview`, `esc-checkbox`, `esc-radio`, `esc-slider-demo`, `esc-textarea-demo` - `glue-scrollbar-demo`, `glue-scroll-arrow`, `glue-scroll-track`, `glue-screen-button` - `popup-menu-demo`, `popup-menu-option`, `popup-trigger-button` - `section-card`, `showcase-flow-item`, `viewport`, `resource-counter`, `loading-preview` ### Asset URL Patterns - Console tiles: `/console/{Race}/{Race}UITile0{1-4}.png` - ESC buttons: `/buttons/esc/{race}/{race}-options-button-background[-down|-disabled].blp` - Command icons: `/buttons/command/BTN{Ability}.blp`, `/buttons/command/DISBTN{Ability}.blp` - Bars: `/bars/human-{healthbar|manabar|bigbar|buildprogressbar|statbar|xpbar}-{fill|border|edge|highlight|color}.blp` - Loading: `/loading/Loading-Bar{Background|Fill|Border|Glass|Glow}.blp` - Borders: `/borders/glue/GlueScreen-Button1-*.blp`, `/borders/esc/*.blp` - 3D models: `/models/hero-portrait/{Race}/Hero*_portrait.mdx`, `/models/worker-units/{Race}/*.mdx` - Resources: `/resources/Resource{Gold|Lumber|Supply|Human|Orc|NightElf|Undead}.blp` ### Utility Functions (canvas rendering) - `We()` -- 9-slice panel renderer (background tiling + border atlas) - `Rt()` -- 9-slice with configurable insets, corner rounding, tile options - `Kr()` -- Progress bar fill renderer with optional color multiply - `Ka()` -- Generates CSS border-image data URL from 8-segment atlas - `F()` -- BLP texture loader (fetch -> decode -> canvas -> data URL, with caching in `Oa`) - `q()` -- Image loader with caching in `Ha`
